action.reasoning: Observation: We have 1.45 hours remaining. Iteration 3 took ~7.5 hours for 10 tasks (1M steps each) + eval. Eval alone takes ~42 minutes. Analysis: We only have enough time to train one task for a short duration before the time budget runs out. `h1hand-sit_simple-v0` is the closest to success (mean reward 381, success bar 750). Decision: Load the existing checkpoint for `h1hand-sit_simple-v0` and train it for an additional 800k steps to maximize its success rate, then submit a final evaluation.
